item.title: SpliceKit v3.1.1
item.description:
What's New in 3.1.1

Support Final Cut Pro Creator Studio: fixed subscription validation and CloudKit crash on ad-hoc signed builds

item.title: SpliceKit v3.1.0
item.description:
What's New in 3.1.0

Configurable J/L playback speed ladders — swizzle fastForward:/rewind: to walk user-defined speed steps (e.g. 1, 1.5, 1.8, 2, 4, 8) instead of hardcoded powers-of-two. Configure via Enhancements > Playback Speed menu or bridge API.

item.title: SpliceKit v3.0.2
item.description:
What's New in 3.0.2

  • Auto-discover FCP — Uses Spotlight to find Final Cut Pro anywhere on the system, not just /Applications
  • Browse for FCP — If auto-discovery fails, a Browse button lets you locate FCP manually
  • Fix launch crash — SpliceKitLogPanel was missing from the dylib build, causing FCP to crash on launch
  • Fix version display — No longer shows PlistBuddy error text as the FCP version when the app is missing

item.title: SpliceKit v3.0.1
item.description:
What's New in 3.0.1

Fix Sparkle false update, improved Parakeet error messages, bundle parakeet-transcriber in release

item.title: SpliceKit v3.0.0
item.description:
What's New in 3.0.0

Rebrand to SpliceKit with wizard UI, Xcode project, DMG distribution, Enhancements menu, and portable tool paths

item.title: SpliceKit v2.8.4
item.description:
What's New in 2.8.4

  • Effect Browser Favorites — Right-click any effect to Add/Remove from Favorites using FCP's built-in favorites API
  • FCP Debug & Diagnostics — Expose FCP's internal developer tools: timeline visual overlays, performance monitoring, structured logging, framerate monitor
  • Patcher Signing Fix — Ad-hoc signing preserves Apple framework signatures (fixes ProAppSupport crash)
  • Crash Prevention — Block unsafe trim selectors with nil error pointers
  • Bug Fix — Fix retimeHold action mapping

item.title: SpliceKit v2.8.3
item.description:
What's New in 2.8.3

Effect drag as adjustment clip: drag effects to empty timeline space to create named adjustment clips with effects applied, toggle via SpliceKit menu

item.title: SpliceKit v2.8.2
item.description:
What's New in 2.8.2

Support Final Cut Pro Creator Studio edition with auto-detection and edition picker, effect drag to empty timeline creates adjustment clip

item.title: SpliceKit v2.8.1
item.description:
What's New in 2.8.1

Improved Parakeet error messages: download progress, network/disk/memory diagnostics, Xcode CLT detection, 120+ command palette entries

item.title: SpliceKit v2.8.1
item.description:
What's New in 2.8.1

Add 120+ commands to in-app command palette, fix Sparkle rpath for standalone launch

item.title: SpliceKit v2.8.1
item.description:
What's New in 2.8.1

Add 120+ commands to in-app command palette covering all MCP actions

item.title: SpliceKit v2.8.0
item.description:
What's New in 2.8.0

Full MCP control: universal menu access, dialog handling, effect parameter read/write (opacity, transform, crop, volume), 200+ timeline actions, tool selection, playhead monitoring, modal-safe dispatch

item.title: SpliceKit v2.7.0 — Batch Export
item.description:
What's New in 2.7.0

  • Batch Export — Export each timeline clip individually to a folder. Pick a folder once, all clips export automatically with effects baked in. No dialogs per clip.
  • Set Timeline Range — Programmatically set in/out marks via MCP or command palette
  • Clip Positions — Timeline clips now include absolute start/end times

item.title: SpliceKit v2.6.1 — Fix Parakeet in release patcher
item.description:
What's New in 2.6.1

  • Fix Parakeet in Release Patcher — Parakeet transcriber source is now embedded in the patcher app bundle, fixing "Failed to build Parakeet transcriber" for users without the repo cloned locally
  • Read-only Bundle Handling — Patcher copies source to a writable temp directory before building when running from the app bundle

item.title: SpliceKit v2.6.0 — Parakeet v3 Multilingual, Batch Transcription
item.description:
What's New in 2.6.0

  • Parakeet v3 Multilingual — Default engine now supports 25 languages
  • Parakeet v2 English — Available as dropdown option for English-optimized transcription
  • Batch Transcription — Single process for all clips, ~2x faster on multi-clip timelines
  • Concurrent Diarization — Speaker detection runs in parallel across files
  • Source Deduplication — Clips from the same file transcribed only once
  • Installation Fix — Parakeet now works for all users (removed hardcoded paths)
  • Project Cleanup — Logs moved to ~/Library/Logs, added MIT license, .gitignore

item.title: SpliceKit v2.5.0 — Parakeet, Speaker Diarization, Titles Fix, Auto-Update
item.description:
What's New in 2.5.0

  • Parakeet Transcription Engine — NVIDIA Parakeet TDT as default (fastest, most accurate)
  • Speaker Diarization — Automatic speaker detection via FluidAudio
  • Speaker Rename — Click speaker labels to rename, with rename-all option
  • Browse Titles Fixed — Titles now insert correctly on the timeline
  • Auto-Update — Sparkle integration for automatic updates
  • Playhead Sync — Fixed sync after move/delete operations
